docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $537.50 FILED BY ABEND, MARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS(SALINAS), SYLVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS(SALINAS), SYLVIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABEND, MARCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS(SALINAS), SYLVIA $537.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $582.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS(SALINAS), SYLVIA
